title: Review R5: wolfhsm post-polish pass
notes:
SEC2: NO_EFFICIENCY_ISSUES
SEC0: found 2 new correctness issues: wolfssl-rs-pvv.6 (nvm_read/nvm_read_raw: out_len not clamped before truncate, stale zeros silently returned) and wolfssl-rs-pvv.9 (mldsa_sign: no sig_len > cap guard before truncate, unlike all other crypto ops). No other correctness issues found.
SEC7 confidence: 12% chance of missed bug. nvm_read_raw gap: does not check out_len <= requested len. Bikeshedding: NO.
Maintainer risk: HIGH — eight issues: silent wrong hash from HsmSha*, missing RAII for cert pubkey, missing counter_init ID validation, untyped SHE key slot IDs, ML-DSA test with no independent oracle, confusing TCP port limit, opaque WH_ERROR_* integers in Display, and fragile with_key! macro sentinel convention that contributors will break silently
